timing: Apply after the remaining Wave-2 product blocks and bundle with the single Wave-2 repin; do not create an intermediate product identity.

private_state.name: *ide-buffers*
private_state.replacement: reuse the value cell of the existing public function symbol ide-buffers under Lisp-2

retained_kind_symbol.name: bytecode
retained_kind_symbol.reason: It is the pinned function-kind result used by the 1.1-G kind contract and remains an interned semantic value, not an IDE command token.

m_x_rule: Displayed command names remain Strings. The existing launcher maps Strings directly to numeric command IDs and never interns a command name.
required_regeneration: the four-engine Workbench artifact differential receipt
the IDE behavior evidence bound to the regenerated IDE/IDEX containers
gates: none of the 16 revoked names remains in the standard-composition intern set
bytecode remains present exactly as a kind symbol
M-x display strings and behavior are unchanged
all capacity dimensions are reported in the Wave-2 repin
claim_limit: This contract prepares an already authorized Wave-2-repin change. It neither changes product bytes now nor pre-authorizes the measured implementation deltas.
